title: Crispy Garlic Moroccan Stir-fry
description: A crispy garlic Moroccan stir-fry featuring red chilli and a tadka flavor profile without the need for eggs. Nostalgic and memorable with its rich spices.

ingredients.name: Tomato puree or chopped fresh tomatoes

instructions: Heat coconut oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add cumin seeds and fry until they splutter, then add chopped garlic and fry for about 2-3 minutes or until fragrant.
Stir in tomato puree or fresh tomatoes along with salt. Mix well and cook until it thickens slightly.
Toss in turmeric powder, coriander powder, and garam masala; mix well to ensure no lumps form.
Slice onions diagonally and add them to the pan. Continue stirring till they start turning golden brown.
Add red chillies (whole) towards the end of cooking onions. Allow them to cook until their outer layer becomes crispy.
For extra crunch, sprinkle some red chillies flakes on top just before serving if desired.
Remove from heat and serve hot with basmati rice or naan bread.
